data.description:
# BUG: child-certification check fails OPEN on a store read error

## Reproduction Steps
1. Close a parent whose child is force-closed (uncertified) while `list_tickets(parent=…)` transiently raises.
2. `completion.py:73-76` catches and returns `([], [])` → `certifiable=True` → parent closes SIGNED over the uncertified child.

Expected: a children-enumeration error withholds certification (fail-closed), like `attest._attested_delivered:668-677`.
Actual: fails open → certification-laundering path.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] On a children-enumeration error, `_child_closure_findings` withholds certification (certifiable=False) or fails the precheck loudly; the "no children found" fast path is preserved for the empty (not errored) case.
- [ ] Regression test simulates the read error and asserts the parent is NOT signed.
- [ ] Commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
data.title: BUG: child-certification check fails OPEN on a store read error
